meetings.title: Q3 Strategy Review
meetings.agenda:
1. Review Q2 performance vs targets
2. Align on Q3 priorities
3. Budget reallocation discussion
4. Action items and owners
meetings.notes_from_last: Q2 revenue came in 8% below target. Team agreed to focus on enterprise segment. Follow-up: James to share updated pipeline report by EOW.

meetings.title: 1:1 with James Okafor
meetings.agenda: Weekly sync — pipeline updates, blockers, career check-in
meetings.notes_from_last: James mentioned he's feeling stretched across two projects. Discussed potential to bring on a contractor. He committed to closing 2 deals this month.

meetings.title: Vendor Demo — DataSync Pro
meetings.agenda: Product walkthrough of DataSync Pro's ETL pipeline features. Focus on real-time sync and compliance tooling.

meetings.title: Engineering Sprint Planning
meetings.agenda:
1. Review completed stories from last sprint
2. Groom and point new stories
3. Assign sprint capacity
4. Flag dependencies and risks
meetings.notes_from_last: Sprint 23 completed 18/22 story points. 4 stories rolled over due to auth service dependency. Priya flagged Redis migration risk.
